questions.q: The term 'Cultural Imperialism' was first used by _______________
The policy of cultural assimilation was a key feature of _______________
The 'White Man's Burden' was a concept coined by _______________
The policy of Divide and Rule was a strategy employed by the _______________ in India during the colonial period
The Indian National Congress was established in 1885 at _______________
The concept of 'Civilising Mission' was a part of the _______________
The policy of 'Kill Many, Cut a Few' was a strategy employed by the _______________ in India during the colonial period
The concept of 'Orientalism' was first used by _______________ to describe the Western perception of the East
The Indian National Congress at its session in 1886 adopted the following resolution in favour of _______________
The Indian National Congress at its session in 1888 resolved that the British government should introduce reforms in the following areas _______________
questions.answer: Civil Services, Local Self-Government and Education
